_meta.purpose: v1.0 public-facing hero asset selection. These files are selected release candidates, not runtime gameplay authority.
_meta.boundary: Hero assets may improve first impression and sharing surfaces. They must not imply unavailable Gu, routes, rewards, canon outcomes, immortal-level facts, or EdgeOne auto-deploy.

entries.usage: Game title screen first viewport hero background.
entries.boundary: Not a playable location unlock and not a promise of complete final art.

entries.usage: EdgeOne/public preview landing hero for external introduction and announcement surfaces.
entries.boundary: No EdgeOne auto-deploy, no marketing claim beyond currently implemented milestones.
